test_implicit_newline4
z"TokenizeTest.test_implicit_newlinec
1 + 1z
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 0) (1, 1)
    OP         '+'           (1, 2) (1, 3)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 4) (1, 5)
    z3if False:
    # NL
    
    True = False # NEWLINE
    NAME       'if'          (1, 0) (1, 2)
    NAME       'False'       (1, 3) (1, 8)
    OP         ':'           (1, 8) (1, 9)
    NEWLINE    '\n'          (1, 9) (1, 10)
    COMMENT    '# NL'        (2, 4) (2, 8)
    NL         '\n'          (2, 8) (2, 9)
    NL         '\n'          (3, 4) (3, 5)
    INDENT     '    '        (4, 0) (4, 4)
    NAME       'True'        (4, 4) (4, 8)
    OP         '='           (4, 9) (4, 10)
    NAME       'False'       (4, 11) (4, 16)
    COMMENT    '# NEWLINE'   (4, 17) (4, 26)
    NEWLINE    '\n'          (4, 26) (4, 27)
    DEDENT     ''            (5, 0) (5, 0)
    s
def k(x):
    x += 2
  x += 5
z3unindent does not match any outer indentation level)

0xff <= 255z
    NUMBER     '0xff'        (1, 0) (1, 4)
    OP         '<='          (1, 5) (1, 7)
    NUMBER     '255'         (1, 8) (1, 11)
    z

    NUMBER     '0b10'        (1, 0) (1, 4)
    OP         '<='          (1, 5) (1, 7)
    NUMBER     '255'         (1, 8) (1, 11)
    z
0o123 <= 0O123z
    NUMBER     '0o123'       (1, 0) (1, 5)
    OP         '<='          (1, 6) (1, 8)
    NUMBER     '0O123'       (1, 9) (1, 14)
    z
1234567 > ~0x15z

    OP         '>'           (1, 8) (1, 9)
    OP         '~'           (1, 10) (1, 11)
    NUMBER     '0x15'        (1, 11) (1, 15)
    z

    OP         '!='          (1, 8) (1, 10)
    NUMBER     '1231515'     (1, 11) (1, 18)

    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 9) (1, 10)
    OP         ')'           (1, 10) (1, 11)

    NUMBER     '200000000'   (1, 14) (1, 23)
    z

Nz!def d22(a, b, c=2, d=2, *k): passa
    NAME       'def'         (1, 0) (1, 3)
    NAME       'd22'         (1, 4) (1, 7)
    OP         '('           (1, 7) (1, 8)
    NAME       'a'           (1, 8) (1, 9)
    OP         ','           (1, 9) (1, 10)
    NAME       'b'           (1, 11) (1, 12)
    OP         ','           (1, 12) (1, 13)
    NAME       'c'           (1, 14) (1, 15)
    OP         '='           (1, 15) (1, 16)
    NUMBER     '2'           (1, 16) (1, 17)
    OP         ','           (1, 17) (1, 18)
    NAME       'd'           (1, 19) (1, 20)
    OP         '='           (1, 20) (1, 21)
    NUMBER     '2'           (1, 21) (1, 22)
    OP         ','           (1, 22) (1, 23)

    NAME       'k'           (1, 25) (1, 26)

    OP         ':'           (1, 27) (1, 28)
    NAME       'pass'        (1, 29) (1, 33)

    NAME       'def'         (1, 0) (1, 3)
    NAME       'd01v_'       (1, 4) (1, 9)
    OP         '('           (1, 9) (1, 10)
    NAME       'a'           (1, 10) (1, 11)
    OP         '='           (1, 11) (1, 12)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 12) (1, 13)
    OP         ','           (1, 13) (1, 14)
    OP         '*'           (1, 15) (1, 16)
    NAME       'k'           (1, 16) (1, 17)
    OP         ','           (1, 17) (1, 18)
    OP         '**'          (1, 19) (1, 21)
    NAME       'w'           (1, 21) (1, 22)
    OP         ')'           (1, 22) (1, 23)
    OP         ':'           (1, 23) (1, 24)
    NAME       'pass'        (1, 25) (1, 29)
    z&def d23(a: str, b: int=3) -> int: passa

    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 3) (1, 4)

    OP         '>'           (1, 9) (1, 10)

    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 7) (1, 8)
    OP         '*'           (1, 8) (1, 9)

test_multiplicative
z TokenizeTest.test_multiplicativec
~1 ^ 1 & 1 |1 ^ -1a
    OP         '~'           (1, 0) (1, 1)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 1) (1, 2)
    OP         '^'           (1, 3) (1, 4)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 5) (1, 6)
    OP         '&'           (1, 7) (1, 8)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 9) (1, 10)
    OP         '|'           (1, 11) (1, 12)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 12) (1, 13)
    OP         '^'           (1, 14) (1, 15)
    OP         '-'           (1, 16) (1, 17)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 17) (1, 18)
    z
-1*1/1+1*1//1 - ---1**1aH
    OP         '-'           (1, 0) (1, 1)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 1) (1, 2)
    OP         '*'           (1, 2) (1, 3)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 3) (1, 4)
    OP         '/'           (1, 4) (1, 5)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 5) (1, 6)
    OP         '+'           (1, 6) (1, 7)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 7) (1, 8)
    OP         '*'           (1, 8) (1, 9)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 9) (1, 10)
    OP         '//'          (1, 10) (1, 12)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 12) (1, 13)
    OP         '-'           (1, 14) (1, 15)
    OP         '-'           (1, 16) (1, 17)
    OP         '-'           (1, 17) (1, 18)
    OP         '-'           (1, 18) (1, 19)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 19) (1, 20)
    OP         '**'          (1, 20) (1, 22)
    NUMBER     '1'           (1, 22) (1, 23)
    r<
